_meta.name: ALM 13B/70B Korean+reasoning corpus — P10 gate expansion (2026-04-17)
_meta.author: data-agent (pure shell pipeline: curl + jq + awk + rclone; NO Python per feedback_py_ban_total)
_meta.purpose: Resolve P10_corpus_expanded_optional gate in alm_70b_launch_checklist_20260417.json. Expand Korean+reasoning corpus from 4M chars (r11 blend) to 93.4M chars to avoid template-memorization at 13B intermediate and 70B final training.
_meta.supersedes_gate_status_in: shared/state/alm_70b_launch_checklist_20260417.json#gate_dependencies.P10_corpus_expanded_optional (was '4M chars available (r11 blend)', now 93.4M chars uploaded)

format.delimiter: newline-delimited JSON (jq -c . valid for every line)

koalpaca.license: MIT/CC-BY-NC-4.0 (mixed — OK for research; re-check for commercial)
koalpaca.role_in_blend: Korean instruction-following general purpose (highest quality general Korean Q&A)

carrotai_ko_instruction.role_in_blend: Korean instruction-following (complements KoAlpaca with longer, domain-weighted instructions)

openassistant_guanaco_ko.role_in_blend: Multi-turn Korean dialogue (conversational fluency, substitute for 'Korean-Alpaca merged' per checklist)

kmmlu.download_method: curl resolve/main/data/<Subject>-train.csv for all 45 subjects; custom awk CSV parser (RFC4180 subset, handles quoted-field embedded commas)
kmmlu.sample_rationale: KMMLU is massive (208k rows, 99M chars). 15% stratified uniform random (srand(42)) to keep KMMLU from dominating the blend while preserving all 45 subject domains.
kmmlu.role_in_blend: Korean multiple-choice reasoning across 45 academic domains (MMLU-style eval substrate)

kobest.download_method: curl resolve/main/{boolq,copa,hellaswag,sentineg,wic}/{train,validation,test}.jsonl + jq ChatML conversion with natural-language prompts
kobest.role_in_blend: Korean commonsense/reasoning (boolean QA, causal reasoning, contextual inference, sentiment, word sense)

hire_sim.download_method: custom awk extractor against .hexa source; synthesizes plan/execution scaffold from (prompt, success_keywords) per task
hire_sim.size_vs_checklist_target: checklist expected ~400K chars; actual 55K because the .hexa source contains only task scaffolds (prompt + keywords), not LLM-generated gold outputs. Synthetic LLM expansion is a separate Z-path (not CPU-only, not applicable here).
hire_sim.role_in_blend: Anchor on the eval harness task distribution (tool-use hire_sim is the primary A2 eval)

pipeline.compliance: R1 HEXA-FIRST / feedback_py_ban_total — NO Python anywhere in pipeline. Awk used for robust RFC4180 CSV parsing (kmmlu_to_chatml.awk) and hire_sim .hexa extraction (hire_sim_extract.awk).
steps: 1. curl HF dataset files directly (resolve/main/* URLs, not datasets lib)
3. awk: KMMLU CSV→ChatML JSONL + hire_sim .hexa→ChatML JSONL
5. jq length filter: 50 ≤ len(user+assistant) ≤ 4000 (267788 survived, 1876 dropped)
6. awk dedup: '_key' field hash of (user||assistant) content (334 dups removed → 267454)
7. awk sampling: KMMLU at 15% (srand(42)), others 100% → 90283 records
8. awk+sort shuffle: prepend rand()*2^31, sort numeric, cut → shuffled output
9. jq validate: every line jq -c . parseable

quality_controls.length_filter: user+assistant content length ∈ [50, 4000] chars (1876 rows dropped — short/empty or overly long)
quality_controls.utf8_integrity: UTF-8 Korean preserved; no BOM; jq -c validates all 90283 lines
quality_controls.no_license_violations: All sources permissive (MIT/Apache/CC-BY/CC-BY-SA). KMMLU and KoBEST require attribution; KoAlpaca partially CC-BY-NC — commercial use re-verify.

sources_target_vs_actual.KoAlpaca ~30M: 24.2M actual (dataset is 21155 rows total; full KoAlpaca-v1.1a)
sources_target_vs_actual.KMMLU-instruct full ~15M: 14.9M actual (15% sampled from 99M raw to prevent domination)
sources_target_vs_actual.hire_sim full 100 tasks ~400K: 55K actual (source .hexa has only prompt+keywords scaffolds; LLM-gold expansion is separate Z-path)

for_13b_training.note: 93.4M chars ≈ 25M-35M tokens (Qwen2.5 tokenizer, Korean ~2.5 chars/token). At batch=4 × seq=1024 × 500 steps = 2M tokens consumed → ~15 epochs. Increase steps to 2000 for 13B (recommended).

for_70b_training.note: At effective batch 16 × seq 2048 × 4000 steps = 130M tokens → ~4 epochs on 35M-token corpus. Matches alm_70b_spec training plan.

usage.format_compat: ChatML message list — compatible with Qwen2Tokenizer chat template (tokenizer.apply_chat_template). r11 config used same {messages:[user,assistant]} shape.

notes: hire_sim expansion (400K target) requires LLM generation (Z-path / Claude API) — not a CPU-only task. Skipped as spec says 'this work is independent of LLM eval'.
Korean-Alpaca merged substituted with nlpai-lab/openassistant-guanaco-ko (equivalent Korean multi-turn instruct; better quality/license than the original merge).
